title: Build educational notes app for classes 6-12

requirements.text: Create a backend data model to store educational notes with fields for class level (6-12), subject name, topic title, and note content
acceptanceCriteria: Data model supports class levels from 6 to 12
Each note has subject, topic, and content fields
Notes can be retrieved by class level and subject

requirements.text: Implement backend methods to add, retrieve, and list notes filtered by class level and subject
acceptanceCriteria: Method to add new notes with validation
Method to get all notes for a specific class
Method to get all notes for a specific subject
Method to get notes filtered by both class and subject

requirements.text: Create a home page with navigation to browse notes by class level (6, 7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12)
acceptanceCriteria: Display all class levels as clickable cards or buttons
Clicking a class navigates to that class's subjects view
Clear visual hierarchy showing class organization

requirements.text: Create a subjects listing page that displays all available subjects for the selected class
acceptanceCriteria: Shows all subjects available for the selected class
Each subject is clickable to view its notes
Display breadcrumb or back navigation to return to class selection

requirements.text: Create a notes viewer page that displays all notes/topics for the selected class and subject combination
acceptanceCriteria: Lists all available notes/topics for the selected filters
Each note shows its title and can be expanded to view content
Navigation to go back to subject selection
Clean, readable formatting for note content

requirements.text: Seed the backend with sample educational notes covering major subjects (Mathematics, Science, English, Social Studies, Hindi) for classes 6-12
acceptanceCriteria: At least 3-5 sample notes per subject per class level
Notes contain meaningful educational content relevant to the class level
Coverage includes core subjects taught in Indian schools

requirements.text: Design a creative educational theme with warm, academic colors (avoid blue and purple), clear typography suitable for reading study material, and a consistent visual style that promotes learning
acceptanceCriteria: Cohesive color scheme appropriate for educational content
Typography optimized for readability of study notes
Layout supports easy navigation between classes and subjects
Visual style is consistent across all pages

constraints: Use only Motoko for backend implementation
Use React with TypeScript and Tailwind CSS for frontend
All notes must be stored in the backend canister
Support exactly classes 6 through 12, no other grade levels
nonGoals: Note editing or contribution by users
Multimedia content like videos or interactive quizzes

required: Educational book stack illustration with warm tones for the home page hero section (books-hero.dim_1200x600.png)
Simple notebook icon for representing individual notes (notebook-icon.dim_64x64.png)
